title: Would you still buy a US Treasury at 5%? (probably yes)
section_path: Would you still buy a US Treasury at 5%? (probably yes)
section_path_text: Would you still buy a US Treasury at 5%? (probably yes)
summary:
Main
New US capital control rules included in the Mega-bill (which is not yet law) could dent returns for Dollar investors. These changes, which will likely affect bonds more than equities, are clearly aimed at reducing demand for the US Dollar, to allow for further depreciation. Will this affect the Dollar's status as a global reserve currency and the Treasury's as a global risk-free asset?
